negativeCapabilities.reason: Claw Code hook API is not publicly documented; the adapter uses a fallback chain over likely payload shapes but no integration has been verified end-to-end
negativeCapabilities.evidence: clawcode/hooks/adapter.js opening comment: 'Claw Code hook API is not publicly documented. ... Test against your actual Claw Code hook payload before relying on this in production'

negativeCapabilities.reason: Claw Code post-tool hook surface is unverified; the post-adapter is wired but has not been confirmed to receive real tool output
negativeCapabilities.evidence: clawcode/hooks/post-adapter.js follows the same speculative shape as the pre-adapter

negativeCapabilities.reason: Claw Code payload shape and cwd field name are not confirmed; the adapter reads cwd/workdir/working_directory/tool_input.cwd as best-effort fallbacks

negativeCapabilities.reason: F15 envelope build/verify wiring has not landed for Claw Code

compensatingRestrictions: Decision-engine treats Claw Code IR's trustMeta as conservative defaults (best-effort/unverified); floors must not assume exact args, exact cwd, or verified interception when sourcing from this adapter
Operators wiring Claw Code are expected to validate hook payload shape against clawcode/POSTTOOL_RESEARCH.md before enabling enforce mode (HORUS_ENFORCE=1)
Until pretool blocking is verified, treat Claw Code as observe-only and rely on out-of-band review for destructive actions
